name: Floral Valley Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Floral Valley Community Center in Howard, OH! There are 10 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Merrin Park
description: Merrin Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fredericktown, OH. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Mount Vernon Memorial Park
description: Mount Vernon Memorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Vernon, OH. There are 4 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Mount Vernon YMCA - Sports Complex
description: Mount Vernon YMCA - Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Vernon, OH. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Riverside Park
description: Come play pickleball at Riverside Park in Mount Vernon, OH! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
